channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Kotlin Function File Icon - Thu Jul 02 07:22:46 UTC 2026
item.description:
Change the icon of a Kotlin file when it has a toplevel function with the same name as the file.
vendor: LSafer downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: net.lsafer.ij.fun_file_icon
